title: Game Modes
seoTitle: Game of Darts Game Modes | BarkinMad Studios
description: Release-facing modes include Match/X01, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, Hare & Hound, Halve It, and All 5s.
summary: Release-facing modes include Match/X01, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, Hare & Hound, Halve It, and All 5s.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts game modes

sections.heading: Live modes
paragraphs: Menu includes Match/X01, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, Hare & Hound, Halve It, and All 5s.
These modes appear across match, practice, and party categories.

sections.heading: More modes
paragraphs: Additional modes and event formats may be added as new updates arrive.
